title: Kejriwal's Pic On Himanta Biswa Sarma's Phone? Viral Video Accidentally Captures Peculiar Sight
description: A peculiar moment was captured on camera when Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma was meeting BJP leader Mithun Chakraborty on Wednesday. A video has surfaced showing a picture of former Delhi CM Arvind Kejriwal on Sarma's phone screen.
